description_long: This is a rectangular filing cabinet with a robust, boxy form and a dark wood grain finish, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance. The cabinet features a single, wide drawer with a recessed handle that runs horizontally across the upper front face, allowing for easy grip and pull. The wood texture is consistent on all visible sides, with subtle variations in grain and color, suggesting a veneer or laminate surface. The top and sides are flat and smooth, suitable for placing additional items or documents. There are no visible label holders or lock mechanisms, indicating a minimalist design focused on utility. The overall construction appears solid, likely intended for use in an office or similar urban environment.
description: A dark wood grain filing cabinet with a single wide drawer and a recessed handle, featuring a minimalist and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide drawer with a recessed handle and the wood grain pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the depth of the cabinet and the continuation of the wood grain texture.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with no visible handle or drawer features.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, again showing the depth and wood grain, mirroring view 1.
